name: Noodles Czarina Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 t Dijon mustard or any other
2 oz Reduced fat Cheddar cheese, shredded (1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve milk powder, salt, mustard, pepper, and corn starch in water. Set aside.
2. Saute onion in olive oil until tender.
3. Stir in the milk mixture, then bring slowly to a boil while stirring constantly.
4. Stir in cheeses and lemon juice.
5. Mix in cooked noodles.
6. Put the mixture into a greased 1 1/2 quart casserole.
7. Bake for 40-45 minutes at 350 degrees until hot and bubbly.
